calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Soo Ja Park (Petitioner). Ken Wong in Propria Persona appearing through Court Call.

Ken Wong stated that he has filed and appeal and is requesting more time to gather his evidence. Mr. Huysentuyt reported that this is a charade, Ken Wong has not legal connection, no standing, his claim has been denied, he filed an action in San Mateo county which was disposed of be demurer, that he has filed two appeals, the first one was denied, that he is now appealing an ex parte application, that Ken Wong is trying to extract vengeance and that he is delaying the Petitioners entitlement to distribution.

The Court stated that it was satisfied with the evidence, cited PC 1310(b) directing the fiduciary to distribute the estate. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to receipt/review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/ Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
